case_title: LIQUID BITS, CORP. ET AL VS. TRENDON T. SHAVERS ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIQUID BITS, CORP. A FLORIDA CORPORATION JACOBSON, REMY AN INDIVIDUAL JACOBSON, JEAN-MARC AN INDIVIDUAL BACHRACH, GREG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAVERS, TRENDON T. AN INDIVIDUAL BITCOIN SAVINGS AND TRUST A TEXAS-BASED ENTITY $11,264,457.00 PRINCIPAL, $60,828.07 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,325,735.07, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIQUID BITS, CORP. A FLORIDA CORPORATION JACOBSON, REMY AN INDIVIDUAL JACOBSON, JEAN-MARC AN INDIVIDUAL BACHRACH, GREG AS TO DEFENDANT SHAVERS, TRENDON T. AN INDIVIDUAL BITCOIN SAVINGS AND TRUST A TEXAS-BASED ENTITY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
